title: crotalaria podocarpa subsp. flexuosa
intro: Crotalaria podocarpa subsp. flexuosa is a plant species within the Crotalaria genus, known for its medicinal and ornamental properties. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, which have been utilized in traditional medicine. The health benefits associated with this plant include the potential treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal disorders, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Crotalaria podocarpa subsp. flexuosa can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture for its medicinal applications.
